title: Prohibited policy provision
doc_html:
§1274. Prohibited policy provision

            A. An insurer shall not include a provision in any policy of property insurance that prohibits an insured from hiring a public adjuster for services provided pursuant to the provisions of this Title.

            B. Subsection A of this Section does not apply to commercial insurance policies written by any surplus lines insurer as defined in R.S. 22:46.

            Acts 2023, No. 328, §1.
doc_text:
§1274.  Prohibited policy provision
A.  An insurer shall not include a provision in any policy of property insurance that
prohibits an insured from hiring a public adjuster for services provided pursuant to the
provisions of this Title.
B.  Subsection A of this Section does not apply to commercial insurance policies
written by any surplus lines insurer as defined in R.S. 22:46.
Acts 2023, No. 328, §1.
